query: Kamala Harris Secret Service protection revoked Trump early 2025

mako.raw:
{"query":"Kamala Harris Secret Service protection revoked Trump early 2025","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1756,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://19thnews.org/2025/08/harris-secret-service-revoked-trump/","title":"Kamala Harris' extended Secret Service protection revoked by Trump","content":"The move comes ahead of the former vice president’s book tour and cancels extra security that had been authorized by former President Joe Biden.
President Donald Trump has revoked former Vice President Kamala Harris’ extended Secret Service protection as she prepares to head out on a book tour.
A senior White House official confirmed the decision, first reported by CNN, to The 19th.
But before he left office, former President Joe Biden signed a previously unreported order extending Harris’ protection for an additional year, CNN reported.
Trump reversed Biden’s order, ending Harris’ protection effective September 1, according to a directive issued Thursday.
Harris’ book tour begins September 24.
Harris announced in July that she would not run in the open race for governor of California in 2026, leaving her political future open.
Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass called the removal of Harris’ Secret Service protection “another act of revenge following a long list of political retaliation.”"},{"url":"https://apnews.com/article/trump-harris-secret-service-protection-894d6ca3f202c0a854390d653c101673","title":"Trump ends Harris' Secret Service protection months early | AP News","content":"WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump has revoked former Vice President Kamala Harris’ Secret Service protection that otherwise would have ended next summer, senior Trump administration officials said Friday.
But Trump’s decisions to revoke the protection have stood out both for timing and for targets.
A senior Trump administration official said an executive memorandum was issued Thursday to the Department of Homeland Security ending Harris’ security detail and security services.
Those had been extended from six to 18 months by the Biden administration, so they would have ended in July 2026, but now they will be terminated on Monday.
While she lost to Trump last November, Harris is seen as a potential candidate for 2028, and she has already announced she will not run for California governor in 2026.
Kim covers the White House for The Associated Press."},{"url":"https://abcnews.com/Politics/trump-revokes-kamala-harris-secret-service-detail-extended/story?id=125098483","title":"Trump revokes Kamala Harris' Secret Service detail extended by Biden - ABC News","content":"The former president extended her detail by one year, according to sources.
Harris," the White House memorandum to the Secretary of Homeland Security states.
A senior White House official confirmed to ABC News that Trump revoked Secret Service protection for Harris via the letter.
This is just the latest protection detail the president has canceled early.
In March, he canceled former Secretary of Homeland Security Alejandro Mayorkas' detail, along with the details of the Biden children, John Bolton and former Secretary of State Mike Pompeo."},{"url":"https://abcnews.com/video/125097468/","title":"Video President Trump revokes Kamala Harris' Secret Service detail - ABC News","content":"President Donald Trump has revoked Secret Service protection for former Vice President Kamala Harris, according to a copy of a letter reviewed by ABC News."},{"url":"https://abcnews.com/video/125120725/","title":"Video President Trump revokes former VP Kamala Harris’ Secret Service - ABC News","content":"New York Knicks and Jalen Brunson take center stage at 2026 ESPYs"}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Kamala Harris Secret Service protection revoked Trump early 2025","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.wbaltv.com/article/kamala-harris-extended-secret-service-detail-canceled/65931854","title":"Trump cancels Kamala Harris' extended Secret Service detail","content":"PRESIDENT DONALD TRUMP HAS REVOKED SECRET SERVICE PROTECTION FOR FORMER VICE PRESIDENT KAMALA HARRIS. President Donald Trump revoked Kamala Harris’ Secret Service protection on Thursday, according to a copy of a letter reviewed by CNN.Former presidents receive Secret Service protection for life. However, her protection had been extended for an additional year via a directive – not made public until now – signed by then-President Joe Biden shortly before leaving office, according to multiple people familiar with the undisclosed arrangement.That is the order Trump canceled in his letter, titled “Memorandum for the Secretary of Homeland Security” and dated Thursday.“You are hereby authorized to discontinue any security-related procedures previously authorized by Executive Memorandum, beyond those required by law, for the following individual, effective September 1, 2025: Former Vice President Kamala D. Harris,” the letter reads in full.The order to remove Harris’ detail came from the White House, one official with the Secret Service told CNN.The decision was not part of a security review or new threat assessment, the source said.","score":0.9177831,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.npr.org/2025/08/29/nx-s1-5522066/kamala-harris-secret-service","title":"Trump ends Harris' Secret Service detail","content":"President Trump has revoked former Vice President Kamala Harris' Secret Service protection, according to Harris spokesperson Kirsten Allen.","score":0.87218446,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.cnn.com/2025/08/29/politics/kamala-harris-secret-service-canceled-trump-biden","title":"Trump cancels Kamala Harris' Secret Service detail ...","content":"President Donald Trump revoked Kamala Harris' Secret Service protection on Thursday, according to a copy of a letter reviewed by CNN.","score":0.8506799,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.politico.com/news/2025/08/29/kamala-harris-secret-service-protection-00535397","title":"Trump revokes Harris' security protections after Biden- ...","content":"President Donald Trump discontinued former Vice President Kamala Harris' Secret Service protection on Thursday, according to a memo reviewed","score":0.8377398,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.newsnationnow.com/politics/kamala-harris-secret-service-protection-revoked","title":"Kamala Harris' Secret Service protection revoked by Trump","content":"President Donald Trump has revoked former Vice President Kamala Harris' Secret Service detail, a White House official told NewsNation","score":0.78650844,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.21,"request_id":"b9304332-0f63-4725-a1a1-8ea4b8dce58f"}
